title: keraselma esula
intro: Keraselma esula, also known as the Russian valerian, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Valerianaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to sedate, calm the nervous system, and act as a natural antispasmodic. The health benefits of Keraselma esula include reducing anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
